name: Lycan
description: A wolf in man's clothing. Banehallow, the Lycan Bites and turns the affected allied hero into a ferocious Wolf Form of Shapeshift's corresponding level.

abilities.name: Apex Predator
abilities.description: Lycan and his player-controlled units deal bonus conditional attack damage to neutral creeps per hero level.

abilities.name: Summon Wolves
abilities.description: Grants haste movement, phase movement, and bonus attack speed with an absolute evasion for a short period of time.

abilities.name: Howl
abilities.description: Strike fear while reducing their armor and attack damage of all enemy units within the radius of Lycan and his wolves.

abilities.name: Feral Impulse
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage and bonus health regeneration to Lycan and all of his player-controlled units.

abilities.name: Wolf Bite
abilities.description: Bites and turns the affected allied hero into a ferocious Wolf Form of Shapeshift's corresponding level.

abilities.name: Shapeshift
abilities.description: Grants Lycan haste movement and critical strike. transforms into a smaller wolf form and grants all ability effects upon cast.
